description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low fence. The front yard features several tall palm trees and a small outdoor seating area with blue chairs, creating a relaxed, tropical atmosphere. Large windows are distributed across the exterior, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house includes a main entryway with a simple door, and the facade is minimally decorated, emphasizing clean lines and functional design. The exterior is predominantly white, with subtle accents of blue from the outdoor furniture and hints of greenery from the landscaping. The overall structure appears to be constructed from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and metal or wooden framing.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a palm-lined front yard featuring blue outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, palm trees, blue outdoor chairs, and a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the window arrangement, palm trees, and the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, additional windows, and the open layout of the interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows visible and a clear look at the flat roof and yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flanked by palm trees and a low fence, minimal decorative elements
